# Type

**Data field**

An unsigned 32-bit field.

## Overview

Contains the four-character code `'tbox'`.

## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the subtitle style atom.
- **Text box**: A 64-bit rectangle that specifies an area to receive text (each 16 bits indicate top, left, bottom, and right, respectively) within the subtitle track.
